easy.question: In which season do flowers bloom and birds sing?
easy.explanation: Spring (Vasant) is when flowers bloom and birds sing.

easy.question: In which season do we carry umbrellas and raincoats?
easy.explanation: The monsoon (rainy season) is when it rains a lot.

easy.question: In ______, we wear warm clothes like sweaters and jackets.
easy.explanation: Winter is cold, so we wear warm clothes.

easy.question: In which season do we eat mangoes and watermelons?
easy.explanation: Mangoes and watermelons are summer fruits.

medium.question: Name all five seasons of India.
medium.explanation: India has five seasons throughout the year.

medium.question: Name two festivals celebrated in winter.
medium.answer: Christmas and Lohri (or Republic Day, Bihu, Gurunanak Jayanti).
medium.explanation: Winter festivals include Lohri, Christmas, Republic Day, and others.

medium.question: In which season do leaves fall from trees?
medium.explanation: Autumn (Sharad) is when leaves fall from trees.

hard.question: Match each season with its description: (a) Spring (b) Monsoon (c) Winter. Descriptions: It rains a lot, Flowers bloom, We wear sweaters.
hard.answer: (a) Spring - Flowers bloom. (b) Monsoon - It rains a lot. (c) Winter - We wear sweaters.
hard.explanation: Each season has its own weather and activities.

easy.question: How many months are there in a year?
How many days are there in a week?
The first month of the year is ______.
easy.explanation: January is the first month of the year.

easy.question: Which month has 28 or 29 days?
easy.explanation: February has 28 days (or 29 in a leap year).

medium.question: Name the 7 days of the week in order.
medium.answer: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday.
medium.explanation: The 7 days repeat in a cycle every week.

medium.question: How many days does January have? How many days does April have?
medium.answer: January has 31 days. April has 30 days.
medium.explanation: Some months have 31 days and some have 30 days.

medium.question: Independence Day is on ______ August.
medium.explanation: India's Independence Day is celebrated on 15th August every year.

hard.question: Name all the months that have 31 days.
hard.answer: January, March, May, July, August, October, December (7 months).
hard.explanation: These 7 months each have 31 days. April, June, September, and November have 30 days. February has 28 or 29.

hard.question: What day comes after Saturday? What month comes after June?
hard.answer: Sunday comes after Saturday. July comes after June.
hard.explanation: Days and months follow a fixed order.

easy.question: The SHORT hand on a clock shows the ______.
easy.explanation: The short hand is the hour hand. It points to the current hour.

easy.question: When the long hand points to 12 and the short hand points to 6, the time is ______ o'clock.
easy.explanation: When the minute hand is at 12, we read the hour from the short hand.

easy.question: If you face the rising sun, you are looking ______.
easy.explanation: The sun rises in the East.

easy.question: When the short hand is at 3 and the long hand is at 12, what time is it?
easy.explanation: The short hand points to 3 and the long hand is at 12, so it is 3 o'clock.

medium.question: Name the four main directions. How do you find East?
medium.answer: North, South, East, West. You find East by facing the rising sun in the morning.
medium.explanation: Face the sunrise to find East. Behind you is West. Left is North. Right is South.

medium.question: Gargi wakes up at 6 o'clock morning and goes to sleep at 9 o'clock night. Which activity takes longer: sleeping or being awake?
medium.answer: Being awake takes longer. She is awake from 6 AM to 9 PM (15 hours) and sleeps from 9 PM to 6 AM (9 hours).
medium.explanation: We compare the hours for each activity.

hard.question: If you face East, your back is towards West. Your left hand points to ______ and your right hand points to ______. Name all 4 directions.
hard.answer: Left hand points to North. Right hand points to South. The 4 directions are: North, South, East, West.
hard.explanation: When facing East: behind = West, left = North, right = South.

hard.question: What is a compass? What does it always point to?
hard.answer: A compass is a small tool that shows directions. It always points to the North.
hard.explanation: A compass helps us find direction no matter where we are.
